title: JSON API - Retrieve emails with spam report
description: Example GET request with spam_report=true to include SpamAssassin analysis in the response.

emails.subject: Your weekly newsletter
emails.spam_report:
SpamAssassin Score: 2.4
---
Tests:
  HTML_MESSAGE: 0.001 (HTML email)
  MIME_HTML_ONLY: 0.1 (only HTML content)
  FROM_EXCESS_BASE64: 0.8 (suspicious encoding)
  BULK_EMAIL_PATTERN: 1.5 (bulk sender indicators)
---
Threshold: 5.0 (not spam)
